title: 1.1: Tests that WriteAt returns error when write offset is below minWriteOffset
1.3: Tests that Close returns error containing 'incomplete download' when bytesSent is less than expectedSize for download transfers
1.4: Tests that WriteAt returns error when underlying file handle is closed
1.5: Tests that ReadAt returns error when underlying file handle is closed
1.6: Tests that ReadAt returns error on pipe after closeIO() is called
1.7: Tests that WriteAt returns error on pipe after closeIO() is called
1.8: Tests that Close returns the error set by TransferError in atomic upload mode
1.10: Tests that target file is deleted after transfer error in atomic upload mode
1.11: Tests that temp file is deleted after transfer error in atomic upload mode
2.1: Places the test for upload resume with invalid offset in the sftpd package
2.2: Places the test for incomplete download detection in the sftpd package
2.3: Places the test for read/write errors with closed handles in the sftpd package
2.4: Places the test for atomic upload error cleanup in the sftpd package
3.1: All tests use Go testing framework with func TestXxx(t *testing.T) signature
3.2: All tests follow naming pattern TestXxxYyy with Test prefix and CamelCase description
3.3: All tests initialize Transfer struct with lock: new(sync.Mutex) field
4.1: All tests that create files clean up temporary files at test end
4.2: Sets transferType to transferDownload for the incomplete download test
